sources.title: 2025 Quadrennial Defense Review
sources.supports: Multi-domain denial, resilient defense, redundant C2 and logistics; not exact modeled formations.

sources.title: National Defense Report 2025
sources.supports: Taiwan force development, joint readiness and whole-of-society resilience.

sources.title: Seventh Fleet Facts Sheet
sources.supports: Public maritime command, surface, undersea and naval aviation capability classes; not scenario presence or readiness.

sources.title: Pacific Fleet Organization
sources.supports: Distributed maritime operations, information warfare and fleet readiness mission areas.

sources.title: Commander, Submarine Force Pacific Mission
sources.supports: Public undersea warfare, strike, ISR, mine and special-warfare mission classes.

sources.title: P-8A Poseidon Fact File
sources.supports: Maritime patrol, reconnaissance and anti-submarine mission class.

sources.title: MQ-4C Triton
sources.supports: Persistent maritime ISR capability class.

sources.title: 3d Marine Littoral Regiment
sources.supports: Stand-in force, reconnaissance, counter-reconnaissance and sea-denial roles.

sources.title: Force Design
sources.supports: Littoral, sensing, fires, protection and logistics capability direction.

sources.title: PACAF Mission, Vision and Priorities
sources.supports: Joint air, space and cyberspace integration with allies and partners.

sources.title: Agile Combat Employment
sources.supports: Distributed, resilient air operations from dispersed locations.

sources.title: Bomber Task Force 25-1
sources.supports: Public long-range strike, refueling and joint/coalition training context.

sources.title: Collaborative Combat Aircraft Mission Design Series
sources.supports: Current CCA development; scaled 2040 formations remain notional.

sources.title: U.S. Space Forces Indo-Pacific
sources.supports: Theater space integration, command, awareness, targeting and partner cooperation.

sources.title: Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture FAQ
sources.supports: Transport, tracking, tactical data and battle-management service classes.

sources.title: 2025 Posture Statement
sources.supports: JFHQ-C, defensive cyber, partner activity, mission assurance and theater support.

sources.title: Multi-Domain Task Force Fact Sheet
sources.supports: Public MDTF organization and all-domain sensing/effects mission framing.

sources.title: MSC Far East Mission, Vision and History
sources.supports: Combat logistics, special mission, prepositioning and strategic sealift roles.

sources.title: 2025 USSOCOM Fact Book
sources.supports: SOCPAC as the theater functional component; not fungible strike capacity.

sources.title: Philippines-United States 2+2 Ministerial Dialogue
sources.supports: Alliance cooperation and access context; not guaranteed contingency participation.

sources.title: Direction of Defense Capability Transformation
sources.supports: Current cyber, space, data and electromagnetic direction; participation remains conditional.

sources.title: Joint Capabilities Group
sources.supports: Current joint cyber, space and information organizations; participation remains conditional.

sources.title: Communications and Cyber Resilience
sources.supports: Civil communications-resilience architecture; military integration remains a scenario assumption.

metadata.scenarioName: Taiwan-led Joint Force denial network — 2040 notional
metadata.description: Sovereign Taiwan defense integrated with U.S. joint maritime, air, land, space, cyber and logistics mission packages; partner and commercial access remains conditional.
metadata.forceDesignBoundary: Capability aggregates and representative operating areas; not a literal order of battle, target list, readiness estimate or prediction of participation.
